title: This Bird Hunts the Deadliest Snakes on Foot
script: This bird stands four feet tall, weighs less than a house cat, and hunts snakes that can kill a person in twenty minutes. The secretary bird. It does not strike from the sky, it walks up to a puff adder or cobra, flares its wings as a shield, and stomps. Each kick lands with five times its own body weight, faster than the snake can strike back, until the spine snaps. Its legs are covered in thick scales so venom cannot get through. A single bird can kill and eat more than three snakes in one afternoon, clearing farmland no person wants to walk into. What made a bird evolve into a snake's worst nightmare?
